title: hopea selanica
intro: Hopea selanica, also known as Selan tree or Borneo ironwood, is a species of tree in the family Dipterocarpaceae. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. It has been traditionally used to treat various health conditions, such as fever, diarrhea, and respiratory issues, due to its health benefits of reducing inflammation and improving overall well-being. Hopea selanica can be prepared into herbal remedies, including teas, infusions, and extracts, which are often used in traditional medicine to alleviate symptoms and promote healing.
